messages.content: Im just an extra ass person. Selfish as fuck. But also wanna spread positivity like a motherfucker. It’s boring being happy alone lol.

I love this vibe — raw and real, but with that spark of wanting to uplift others too. It’s wild how you can feel selfish in your core and still crave to spread good energy. Kind of like owning your whole spectrum.  

Being happy alone *is* boring. Happiness hits different when it’s shared, when your energy bounces off others and multiplies. What’s your favorite way to spread positivity? Like, what’s your signature move for lighting people up?
